creator: david@usermode.org
text:
After upgrading to the new X.org, I discover that KMyMoney will "hang" X11 
anytime another window overlaps it. The other window can be from another app, 
or one of kmymoney's own dialogs. It happens in the KDE4 desktop, as well as 
in Blackbox. The "hang" behavior is that the mouse moves extremely slow, and 
neither mouse clicks or keystrokes are effective. The only way out is to power 
off the computer, or ssh in from outside. Very very annoying.
 
What makes this weird, is that this happens even when running KMyMoney 
remotely from a Linux box! This is the only KDE3 program I have, but I suspect 
it may apply to other KDE3 apps. It also happens with OpenOffice.org when 
opening the template dialog.
 
The last line of my Xorg.0.conf files is: "[mi] EQ overflowing. The server is probably 
stuck in an infinite loop."
 
xorg-7.5
xorg-server-1.7.5,1
kmymoney2-1.0.3_2
8.0-STABLE
radeon driver

How-To-Repeat: Run KMyMoney. Open up any application dialog.
